question: Bitcoin Up or Down - January 27, 12PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the BTC/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Bitcoin Up or Down on January 27?
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT Jan 26 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is lower than the final "Close" price for the Jan 27 '26 12:00 ET candle.

This market will resolve to "Down" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for BTC/USDT Jan 26 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is higher than the final "Close" price for the Jan 27 '26 12:00 ET candle.

If the final "Close" price for both of these candles is exactly equal on Binance, this market will resolve 50-50.

The resolution source for this market is Binance, specifically the BTC/USDT "Close" prices currently available at https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT with "1m" and "Candles" selected on the top bar.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance BTC/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: XRP Up or Down on January 27?
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the "Close" price for the Binance 1 minute candle for XRP/USDT Jan 26 '26 12:00 in the ET timezone (noon) is lower than the final "Close" price for the Jan 27 '26 12:00 ET candle.

question: Map Handicap: Fingers (-1.5) vs GenOne (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Fingers Crossed and GenOne in the A1 Gaming League Group Stage, scheduled for January 25 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Fingers Crossed" if Fingers Crossed wins 2 or more maps than GenOne in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "GenOne".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

events.title: Counter-Strike: Fingers Crossed vs GenOne (BO3) - A1 Gaming League Group Stage
events.description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Fingers Crossed and GenOne in the A1 Gaming League Group Stage, scheduled for January 25 at 11:30AM ET.

This market will resolve to "Fingers Crossed" if Fingers Crossed win the match against GenOne.

This market will resolve to "GenOne" if GenOne win the match against Fingers Crossed.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://www.sofascore.com/esports.

question: Oregon Ducks vs. Washington Huskies: O/U 144.5
description:
In the upcoming CBB game, scheduled for January 25 at 3:00 PM ET:

This market will resolve to "Over" if the Oregon Ducks and Washington Huskies combine to score 145 or more points in this game.

If the combined total is less than 145, this market will resolve to "Under".

The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.

question: Series PARIVISION Rounds Handicap (-5.5) vs Heroic (+5.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Heroic and PARIVISION in the IEM Krakow Play-In, scheduled for January 28 at 6:00AM ET.

If PARIVISION defeats Heroic by 6 or more rounds across all Matchs in this match, this market will resolve to "PARIVISION".

Otherwise, it will resolve to "Heroic".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed. If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50–50.

If the game is started but not completed, this market will resolve according to the official final score published on a-league.com.au. This market refers only to the outcome within the first 90 minutes of regular play plus stoppage time.

question: Map Handicap: UNiTY (-1.5) vs MOUZ NXT (+1.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between MOUZ NXT and UNiTY esports in the NODWIN Clutch Series Group Stage, scheduled for January 25 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "UNiTY esports" if UNiTY esports wins 2 or more maps than MOUZ NXT in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "MOUZ NXT".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Solana Up or Down - January 27, 2PM ET
description:
This market will resolve to "Up" if the close price is greater than or equal to the open price for the SOL/USDT 1 hour candle that begins on the time and date specified in the title. Otherwise, this market will resolve to "Down".

The resolution source for this market is information from Binance, specifically the SOL/USDT pair (https://www.binance.com/en/trade/SOL_USDT). The close « C » and open « O » displayed at the top of the graph for the relevant "1H" candle will be used once the data for that candle is finalized.

Please note that this market is about the price according to Binance SOL/USDT, not according to other sources or spot markets.

question: Map Handicap: GG (-2.5) vs MIBR (+2.5)
description:
This market refers to the Counter-Strike match between Gaimin Gladiators and MIBR in the Circuit X Betboom Redemption Curitiba Playoffs, scheduled for January 25 at 1:00PM ET.

This market will resolve to "Gaimin Gladiators" if Gaimin Gladiators wins 3 or more maps than MIBR in this match.

Otherwise, this market will resolve to "MIBR".

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50.

question: Valorant: All Gamers vs Dragon Ranger Gaming (BO3) - VCT China Kickoff Playoffs
description:
This market refers to the Valorant match between All Gamers and Dragon Ranger Gaming in the VCT China Kickoff Playoffs, scheduled for January 31 at 6:00AM ET.

This market will resolve to "All Gamers" if All Gamers win the match against Dragon Ranger Gaming.

This market will resolve to "Dragon Ranger Gaming" if Dragon Ranger Gaming win the match against All Gamers.

If the match is canceled (not played at all), ends in a tie, or is delayed beyond 7 days from the scheduled date without a winner determined, this market will resolve to 50-50. 

If the match begins but is not completed, and one team wins due to the opponent's forfeiture, disqualification, or walkover, this market will resolve to the team who wins. 

If the match ends in a forfeit, disqualification, or walkover (team withdraws before the start and the other wins automatically), this market will resolve to 50-50. 

The resolution source for this market will be official information from https://liquipedia.net/valorant/Main_Page.
